😤 Yeh Bhi Aapki Pareshani Hai?

Kya Aap Bhi Inse Pareshan Hain?

Ye problems hain jo har Indian kirana owner, retailer aur small business face karta hai har roz...

😤

"Mera stock kahan gaya?" — Inventory track karna mushkil, stock khatam hone par pata hi nahi chalta. Customers khali haath return karte hain.

😩

"Billing mein ghante lagte hain" — Manual invoice banana slow hai, mistakes hoti hain, queue lagti hai. Business dheema padta hai.

💸

"₹2,000–₹5,000 monthly subscription!" — Tally, Zoho, Vyapar — sab ke monthly charges hain. Chhote business ke liye afford karna mushkil.

🌐

"Internet nahi toh dukaan band!" — Cloud software bina net ke kaam nahi karta. Ek power cut ya network failure sab rok deta hai.

😰

"5 alag alag apps use karna padta hai" — Inventory alag, billing alag, reports alag — sab kuch scattered. Koi ek unified system nahi.

📊

"Pata hi nahi kaunsa product best sell ho raha hai" — Bina proper reports ke decision lena guesswork hai. Business grow nahi karta.

✅ BusinessOS Pro Yeh Sab Solve Karta Hai

Ek file. Ek payment. Lifetime solution.
🚀 Powerful Features

Har Feature Jo Aapke Business Ko Aage Le Jaaye

Enterprise-level software — ek simple file mein. Koi installation nahi, koi server nahi, koi monthly fee nahi.

📊 Live Dashboard

Ek Nazar Mein Poora Business

Total revenue, net profit, stock value, low-stock alerts, unpaid invoices — sab kuch real-time mein. Aapka business at a glance.

  • Revenue, Profit & Stock Value live dikhe
  • Unpaid invoices ka instant alert
  • Top selling products ka quick view
  • Smart restock recommendations
🧾 POS & Invoicing

30 Seconds Mein Professional Invoice

Barcode scan karo, item add karo, GST apply karo — invoice ready. Thermal aur A4 dono modes. Customer ko instantly print karke do.

  • Barcode scan se lightning-fast billing
  • Thermal + conventional print modes
  • Auto GST calculation (CGST/SGST/IGST)
  • Multi-currency support (INR, USD, EUR...)
📦 Inventory Control

Kabhi Stock Out Mat Ho!

Har product ka real-time stock track karo. Low stock alert set karo. Urgency-ranked restock list generate karo. Aur kabhi apna best-selling item khatam mat karne do.

  • Real-time stock levels har product ka
  • Smart low-stock alerts automatically
  • Bulk import/export products
  • Category-wise filter aur management
🔍 Barcode System

Barcode Generate, Print & Scan — Sab Built-in

Alag barcode software ki zaroorat nahi. Kisi bhi product ka label generate karo, A4 ya thermal paper par print karo, aur POS par scan karke instant billing karo.

  • Single + bulk batch label printing
  • A4 aur thermal paper support
  • Category-wise batch print
  • High-resolution PDF output
📈 Reports & Analytics

Data Se Smart Decisions Lo

Visual sales charts, profit analysis, tax reports — sab filter by date. CSV ya PDF mein export karo. Apne CA ko direct de do.

  • Daily/monthly sales charts visual
  • Profit margin analysis har product ka
  • Paid/unpaid invoice tracking
  • CSV + PDF export for accountant
🔐 Security & Global Settings

15+ Currencies + Enterprise Security

INR, USD, EUR, GBP aur 15+ currencies — one click se switch karo. Admin aur Staff ke alag logins se apna sensitive data safe rakho.

  • INR + 15 global currencies support
  • Admin & Staff separate logins
  • Auto weekly CSV export to email
  • Encrypted backup — data sirf aapka

❓ FAQ

Aapke Common Sawaal, Seedhe Jawab

Aapko instantly 3 cheezein milegi: (1) BusinessOS Pro — ek single HTML file, (2) 14-page PDF User Manual, aur (3) Feature Overview Video. Sab kuch aapke email par minutes mein aa jaata hai payment ke baad.
Bilkul nahi! Bas HTML file download karo aur Chrome, Firefox, Edge ya Safari mein open karo. Koi installation, koi server, koi plugin — kuch nahi. Apne computer ya tablet mein seedha kaam karta hai.
Haan, 100%! Ek baar download karo, phir kabhi internet ki zaroorat nahi. Kirana shop, market stall, ya kaheen bhi — bina WiFi ke chalega. Aapka saara data sirf aapke device par rehta hai.
Bilkul! Invoice module mein CGST, SGST, IGST ke dedicated fields hain. INR primary currency hai. GST-friendly tax reports generate hote hain jo aap directly CA ko de sakte ho. CSV ya PDF mein export kar sakte ho.
Haan! 2 role-based logins hain — Admin aur Staff. Admin ko poora access hai; Staff sirf POS aur inventory use kar sakta hai — sensitive financial data nahi dekh sakta. Aapka business data secure rehta hai.
100% ek baar. ₹999 pay karo aur lifetime ke liye use karo. Koi monthly fee nahi, koi annual renewal nahi, koi per-user charge nahi, koi hidden cost bilkul nahi. Future updates bhi free milenge hamesha ke liye.
Aapko personal email support milti hai purchase ke saath. 14-page manual aur video step-by-step sab guide karte hain. Zyaadatar customers 30 minutes mein fully operational ho jaate hain. Koi bhi issue ho, email karo — hum jaldi reply karte hain.
